title: filter / values clause with transitive path queries: Virtuoso 37000 Error TR...: transitive start not given
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE countries (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, population INTEGER);
INSERT INTO countries (id, name, population) VALUES (1, 'Germany', 83783942), (2, 'United States', 331002651);
CREATE TABLE synonyms (country_id INTEGER, synonym TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (country_id) REFERENCES countries(id));
SELECT DISTINCT c.name, s.synonym FROM countries c JOIN synonyms s ON c.id = s.country_id WHERE c.name IN ('Germany', 'United States');
key_bug_features: FILTER with multiple values causes transitive start error
